landing.headline: Your campaign. Funded by the people.
landing.body: Focus on winning, we handle the fundraising. Impulso is the all-in-one fundraising platform for Dominican candidates. Accept donations directly from supporters by credit card or tPago.
landing.impactLabel: people have used Impulso to donate directly to their preferred political candidate

how.title: How it works
how.subtext: Everything your campaign needs — in one platform.
how.step1Desc: In a few clicks, upload your campaign graphics, set your fundraising goal, and go live. Your campaign must be officially registered with the Junta Central Electoral (JCE).
how.step2Title: Share your link — and start receiving
how.step2Desc: We generate a unique donation link for your campaign. Share it on WhatsApp, Instagram, or email. Supporters can donate once or contribute recurrently. We accept all major credit and debit cards and tPago.
how.step3Desc: Every donor submits their Cédula. This lets us generate reports that are fully compliant with JCE requirements — ready to submit with one click.
how.step4Desc: Upload your contact list. Impulso sends personalized emails and makes calls on your behalf — with messaging crafted by your campaign team and refined by AI.
how.step5Desc: All donor data is encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256 — the same standard used by banks and governments worldwide.
how.dashSub: Your dashboard tracks every donation the moment it happens.

cta.headline: Ready to fuel your campaign?
cta.subtext: Join hundreds of Dominican candidates using Impulso to raise funds transparently and efficiently.
cta.trust: No setup fees · Cancel anytime · JCE-verified platform

footer.brand: The transparent fundraising platform for Dominican political campaigns.
footer.tagline: Built for democracy. Powered by transparency.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Impulso campaign account

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start your Impulso campaign today
signup.errorLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

onboarding.step2Sub: We've pre-filled this based on your info. Feel free to edit.
onboarding.step3Sub: Enter your JCE registration number to go live.
onboarding.step4Sub: Check your details before going live.
onboarding.partySource: Source: JCE Dirección de Partidos Políticos, updated February 26, 2026
onboarding.electionTypeLabel: Are you running in a primary or general election?
onboarding.jceInfoText: Election dates are officially set by the Junta Central Electoral (JCE) and cannot be modified. Impulso automatically calculates your deadline based on the
onboarding.campaignNameSub: Your donation link will be generated automatically from this name.
onboarding.goalSub: Set a realistic goal for your campaign period. You can update this from your dashboard at any time.
onboarding.pdfDesc: Upload your official campaign platform document (PDF). We use it to describe your proposals to donors on your donation page, generate personalized outreach emails and call scripts, and design your page visuals to match your campaign identity.
onboarding.pdfDragText: Drag & drop your PDF here, or click to browse
onboarding.bannerDragText: Drag & drop your banner here, or click to browse
onboarding.photoSub: Required. This photo will be shown to donors when they visit your donation page.
onboarding.photoDragText: Drag & drop your photo here, or click to browse
onboarding.contactSub: How can donors and supporters reach your team?
onboarding.contactFootnote: WhatsApp is required. Social links are optional but help donors connect with your campaign.
onboarding.jceInfoBox: Impulso only works with campaigns officially registered with the Junta Central Electoral (JCE). Enter your registration number — we'll verify it instantly against our registry.
onboarding.jceNotFound: This number was not found in our JCE registry. Please verify your registration or contact us at hello@impulso.do
onboarding.checkbox1: I confirm this campaign is officially registered with the Junta Central Electoral and complies with Ley 33-18 de Partidos, Agrupaciones y Movimientos Políticos.
onboarding.checkbox2: I understand that all donor contributions will be reported to the JCE and must comply with Article 63 of Ley 33-18.
onboarding.skipModalTitle: Your page won't be public yet
onboarding.skipModalBody: No problem — you can finish setting up your campaign and explore your dashboard. However, your donation page will remain private until our team receives and verifies your JCE registration number. You can submit it anytime from your dashboard.
onboarding.skipModalPrimary: Go back and add my JCE number
onboarding.launchNote: Your donation page will go live once our team confirms your JCE registration. We'll notify you by email within 1–2 business days.
onboarding.successToast: Campaign created! We'll notify you once your JCE verification is complete.
onboarding.photoHint: Drag & drop or click to upload · JPG or PNG, max 5 MB
onboarding.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell supporters what you stand for and why this campaign matters…
onboarding.bannerHint: Drag & drop or click to upload · JPG or PNG, 16:9 recommended, max 5 MB
onboarding.checkbox1Old: I confirm this campaign is officially registered with the Junta Central Electoral (JCE).
onboarding.checkbox2Old: I agree to the Impulso Terms of Service and will comply with Dominican electoral finance laws.
onboarding.summaryStatusNote: Our team will verify your JCE registration within 24 hours.
onboarding.errorRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
onboarding.jceCallout: Your campaign must be registered at the JCE before launching.
